Published v0.3.3 successfully to npm Local-Dir: /Users/d/Projects/claude-code-sdk-ts/claude-code-sdk-ts") | 10 months agoJun 27, 2025 | | View all files | ## Repository files navigation # Claude Code SDK for TypeScript [Permalink: Claude Code SDK for TypeScript](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#claude-code-sdk-for-typescript) [![npm version](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/ac9a56f81e7e1e3a1b7052507066e65c8299afcfdfe7b90021beacaf49c1a01d/68747470733a2f2f62616467652e667572792e696f2f6a732f40696e7374616e746c7965617379253246636c617564652d636f64652d73646b2d74732e737667)](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts)[![npm downloads](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/ad78abeb6976319698f55c180cc083e1041a3b193afb1a842e6b4f1134eae2a8/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f6e706d2f646d2f40696e7374616e746c79656173792f636c617564652d636f64652d73646b2d74732e737667)](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts)[![License: MIT](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/fdf2982b9f5d7489dcf44570e714e3a15fce6253e0cc6b5aa61a075aac2ff71b/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f62616467652f4c6963656e73652d4d49542d79656c6c6f772e737667)](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT)[![TypeScript](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/3f7aa4d4b76ec74c63ee6dae6af9660811d1e07f344825798974cd555da91b4e/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f62616467652f547970655363726970742d352e332b2d626c75652e737667)](https://www.typescriptlang.org/)[![Node.js Version](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/2d01e12197ddc277488d2a100f52ec711785c93c7a81b69f77d9562c27dafa90/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f6e6f64652f762f40696e7374616e746c79656173792f636c617564652d636f64652d73646b2d74732e737667)](https://nodejs.org/) Unofficial TypeScript SDK for [Claude Code](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code) \- the powerful CLI tool for interacting with Claude. **✨ What's New in v0.3.3:** - 🎬 **Interactive streaming session** with working visual typewriter effects - 🛡️ **Advanced error handling** with retry strategies and typed errors - 📊 **Token streaming analysis** with honest documentation about current behavior - 🔧 **Production-ready examples** that actually work as advertised > **Note**: For the classic async generator API, see [Classic API Documentation](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts/blob/main/docs/CLASSIC_API.md). ## Installation [Permalink: Installation](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#installation) ``` npm install @instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts # or yarn add @instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts # or pnpm add @instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts ``` **Latest Version:**`v0.3.3` with enhanced features and working visual streaming! **Prerequisites:** - Node.js 18 or later - Claude Code CLI installed (`npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code`) ## Quick Start [Permalink: Quick Start](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#quick-start) ``` import { claude } from '@instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts'; // Simple query const response = await claude() .query('Say "Hello World!"') .asText(); console.log(response); // "Hello World!" ``` ## Authentication [Permalink: Authentication](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#authentication) This SDK delegates all authentication to the Claude CLI: ``` # One-time setup - login with your Claude account claude login ``` The SDK does not handle authentication directly. If you see authentication errors, authenticate using the Claude CLI first. ## Core Features [Permalink: Core Features](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#core-features) ### 🎯 Fluent API [Permalink: 🎯 Fluent API](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#-fluent-api) Chain methods for clean, readable code: ``` const result = await claude() .withModel('sonnet') // Choose model .allowTools('Read', 'Write') // Configure permissions .skipPermissions() // Auto-accept edits .inDirectory('/path/to/project') // Set working directory .query('Refactor this code') // Your prompt .asText(); // Get response as text ``` ### 📊 Response Parsing [Permalink: 📊 Response Parsing](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#-response-parsing) Extract exactly what you need: ``` // Get plain text const text = await claude() .query('Explain this concept') .asText(); // Parse JSON response const data = await claude() .query('Return a JSON array of files') .asJSON(); // Get the final result const result = await claude() .query('Complete this task') .asResult(); // Analyze tool usage const tools = await claude() .allowTools('Read', 'Grep') .query('Find all TODO comments') .asToolExecutions(); for (const execution of tools) { console.log(`${execution.tool}: ${execution.isError ? 'Failed' : 'Success'}`); } ``` ### 🔧 Tool Management [Permalink: 🔧 Tool Management](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#-tool-management) Fine-grained control over Claude's capabilities: ``` // Allow specific tools await claude() .allowTools('Read', 'Grep', 'LS') .query('Analyze this codebase') .asText(); // Deny dangerous tools await claude() .denyTools('Bash', 'Write') .query('Review this code') .asText(); // Read-only mode (no tools) await claude() .allowTools() // Empty = deny all .query('Explain this architecture') .asText(); ``` ### 💬 Session Management [Permalink: 💬 Session Management](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#-session-management) Maintain conversation context across queries: ``` const session = claude() .withModel('sonnet') .skipPermissions(); // First query const response1 = await session .query('Pick a random number between 1 and 100') .asText(); // Continue with context const sessionId = await session.query('').getSessionId(); const response2 = await session .withSessionId(sessionId) .query('What number did you pick?') .asText(); // Claude remembers the number! ``` ### 🚦 Cancellation Support [Permalink: 🚦 Cancellation Support](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#-cancellation-support) Cancel long-running operations: ``` const controller = new AbortController(); // Cancel after 5 seconds setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 5000); try { const response = await claude() .withSignal(controller.signal) .query('Long running task') .asText(); } catch (error) { if (error instanceof AbortError) { console.log('Query was cancelled'); } } ``` ### 📝 Logging [Permalink: 📝 Logging](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#-logging) Built-in logging with multiple implementations: ``` import { ConsoleLogger, LogLevel } from '@instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts'; const logger = new ConsoleLogger(LogLevel.DEBUG); const response = await claude() .withLogger(logger) .query('Debug this issue') .asText(); // Also available: JSONLogger, MultiLogger, NullLogger ``` ### 🎭 Event Handlers [Permalink: 🎭 Event Handlers](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#-event-handlers) React to events during execution: ``` await claude() .onMessage(msg => console.log('Message:', msg.type)) .onAssistant(msg => console.log('Claude:', msg)) .onToolUse(tool => console.log(`Using ${tool.name}...`)) .query('Perform analysis') .stream(async (message) => { // Handle streaming messages }); ``` ## Environment Variables [Permalink: Environment Variables](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#environment-variables) The SDK automatically loads safe configuration from environment: - `DEBUG` \- Enable debug mode (values: `true`, `1`, `yes`, `on`) - `VERBOSE` \- Enable verbose output - `LOG_LEVEL` \- Set log level (0-4) - `NODE_ENV` \- Node environment **⚠️ Important**: API keys are NOT automatically loaded from `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` for safety. This prevents accidental billing charges. See [Environment Variables Documentation](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts/blob/main/docs/ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES.md). ## Error Handling [Permalink: Error Handling](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#error-handling) Enhanced error handling with categories and resolution hints: ``` import { isEnhancedError, hasResolution } from '@instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts'; try { await claude().query('Task').asText(); } catch (error) { if (isEnhancedError(error)) { console.error(`${error.category} error: ${error.message}`); if (hasResolution(error)) { console.error('Try:', error.resolution); } } } ``` Error categories include: - `network` \- Connection issues - `authentication` \- Auth problems - `permission` \- Access denied - `timeout` \- Operation timeouts - `validation` \- Invalid input - `cli` \- Claude CLI issues - `configuration` \- Config problems ## Advanced Usage [Permalink: Advanced Usage](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#advanced-usage) ### Configuration Files & Roles [Permalink: Configuration Files & Roles](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#configuration-files--roles) Load settings and define reusable roles from YAML or JSON: ``` // Load configuration with roles await claude() .withConfigFile('./config/claude.yaml') .withRole('developer', { language: 'TypeScript', framework: 'React' }) .query('Generate component') .asText(); ``` #### Role System [Permalink: Role System](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#role-system) Roles provide reusable configurations with: - Model preferences - Tool permissions - Custom prompts with template variables - Context settings (temperature, max tokens) - Inheritance support Example YAML config with roles: ``` version: "1.0" globalSettings: model: opus timeout: 60000 # Define reusable roles roles: developer: model: sonnet tools: allowed: [Read, Write, Edit] denied: [Delete] prompts: prefix: "You are an expert ${language} developer using ${framework}." senior-developer: extends: developer # Inherit from developer role model: opus permissions: mode: acceptEdits tools: allowed: [TodoRead, TodoWrite] # Additional tools ``` ``` // Using roles with template variables const response = await claude() .withRolesFile('./roles.yaml') .withRole('senior-developer', { language: 'TypeScript', framework: 'Next.js', specialty: 'performance optimization' }) .query('Optimize this React component') .asText(); ``` See [Roles Documentation](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts/blob/main/docs/NEW_FEATURES.md#rolespersonas-system) for complete details. ### Production Features [Permalink: Production Features](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#production-features) #### Token Usage & Costs [Permalink: Token Usage & Costs](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#token-usage--costs) ``` const parser = await claude() .query('Complex task') .getParser(); const usage = await parser.getUsage(); console.log('Tokens:', usage.totalTokens); console.log('Cost: $', usage.totalCost); ``` #### Streaming [Permalink: Streaming](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#streaming) ``` await claude() .query('Tell me a story') .stream(async (message) => { if (message.type === 'assistant') { // Stream complete messages (not individual tokens) console.log(message.content[0].text); } }); ``` #### Custom Models & Endpoints [Permalink: Custom Models & Endpoints](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#custom-models--endpoints) ``` const response = await claude() .withModel('claude-3-opus-20240229') .withTimeout(30000) .query('Complex analysis') .asText(); ``` ## 🚀 Enhanced Features (v0.3.3) [Permalink: 🚀 Enhanced Features (v0.3.3)](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#-enhanced-features-v033) ### ✨ Visual Token Streaming [Permalink: ✨ Visual Token Streaming](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#-visual-token-streaming) Create typewriter effects and real-time response display: ``` import { claude, createTokenStream } from '@instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts'; // Collect response for controlled display const messageGenerator = claude() .withModel('sonnet') .queryRaw('Write a story about AI'); const tokenStream = createTokenStream(messageGenerator); const allTokens = []; for await (const chunk of tokenStream.tokens()) { allTokens.push(chunk.token); } // Display with typewriter effect const fullText = allTokens.join(''); for (const char of fullText) { process.stdout.write(char); await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 30)); } ``` ### 🛡️ Advanced Error Handling [Permalink: 🛡️ Advanced Error Handling](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#%EF%B8%8F-advanced-error-handling) Handle specific error types with smart retry logic: ``` import { claude, detectErrorType, withRetry } from '@instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts'; try { const result = await withRetry( async () => claude().query('Complex task').asText(), { maxAttempts: 3, strategy: 'exponential', shouldRetry: (error) => { const errorType = detectErrorType(error.message); return ['network_error', 'timeout_error'].includes(errorType); } } ); } catch (error) { const errorType = detectErrorType(error.message); console.log(`Failed with error type: ${errorType}`); } ``` ### 🎬 Interactive Streaming Session [Permalink: 🎬 Interactive Streaming Session](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#-interactive-streaming-session) **NEW!** Complete chat interface with visual streaming: ``` # Try the interactive streaming example node examples/fluent-api/new-features/interactive-streaming.js ``` Features working character-by-character display, conversation history, speed control, and model switching! ## Examples [Permalink: Examples](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#examples) Comprehensive examples are available in the [examples directory](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts/blob/main/examples): ### **Basic Examples** [Permalink: Basic Examples](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#basic-examples) - **[fluent-api-demo.js](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts/blob/main/examples/fluent-api-demo.js)** \- Complete fluent API showcase - **[sessions.js](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts/blob/main/examples/sessions.js)** \- Session management patterns - **[yaml-config-demo.js](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts/blob/main/examples/yaml-config-demo.js)** \- Configuration examples ### **Advanced Features** ( [new-features directory](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts/blob/main/examples/fluent-api/new-features)) [Permalink: Advanced Features (new-features directory)](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#advanced-features-new-features-directory) - **[interactive-streaming.js](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts/blob/main/examples/fluent-api/new-features/interactive-streaming.js)** \- 🎬 **Interactive chat with visual streaming** - **[token-streaming.js](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts/blob/main/examples/fluent-api/new-features/token-streaming.js)** \- Working typewriter effects - **[error-handling.js](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts/blob/main/examples/fluent-api/new-features/error-handling.js)** \- Advanced error patterns - **[retry-strategies.js](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts/blob/main/examples/fluent-api/new-features/retry-strategies.js)** \- Multiple retry strategies ### **Core Examples** [Permalink: Core Examples](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#core-examples) - **File Operations** \- Reading, writing, and analyzing code - **Web Research** \- Using Claude's web capabilities - **Interactive Sessions** \- Building conversational interfaces ## Migration from Classic API [Permalink: Migration from Classic API](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#migration-from-classic-api) The SDK maintains full backward compatibility. The classic `query()` function still works: ``` import { query } from '@instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts'; for await (const message of query('Hello')) { // Classic async generator API } ``` However, we recommend the fluent API for new projects. See [Migration Guide](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts/blob/main/docs/FLUENT_API.md#migration-guide). ## API Reference [Permalink: API Reference](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#api-reference) ### `claude(): QueryBuilder` [Permalink: claude(): QueryBuilder](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#claude-querybuilder) Creates a new query builder: ``` claude() .withModel(model: string) .allowTools(...tools: ToolName[]) .denyTools(...tools: ToolName[]) .skipPermissions() .withTimeout(ms: number) .inDirectory(path: string) .withSessionId(id: string) .withSignal(signal: AbortSignal) .withLogger(logger: Logger) .withConfigFile(path: string) .withRole(name: string, vars?: Record) .onMessage(handler: (msg: Message) => void) .onAssistant(handler: (msg: AssistantMessage) => void) .onToolUse(handler: (tool: ToolUseBlock) => void) .query(prompt: string): ResponseParser ``` ### Response Parser Methods [Permalink: Response Parser Methods](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#response-parser-methods) - `asText()` \- Extract plain text - `asJSON()` \- Parse JSON response - `asResult()` \- Get final result message - `asToolExecutions()` \- Get tool execution details - `findToolResults(name)` \- Find specific tool results - `getUsage()` \- Get token usage stats - `getSessionId()` \- Get session ID - `stream(callback)` \- Stream messages ### Types [Permalink: Types](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#types) See [TypeScript definitions](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts/blob/main/dist/index.d.ts) for complete type information. ## Changelog [Permalink: Changelog](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#changelog) See [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md) for version history. ## Contributing [Permalink: Contributing](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#contributing) Contributions are welcome! Please read our contributing guidelines before submitting PRs. ## License [Permalink: License](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#license) MIT © Daniel King & Claude ## Links [Permalink: Links](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#links) - [NPM Package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts) - [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts) - [Claude Code CLI](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code) - [Official Python SDK](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-sdk) ## About Fluent, chainable TypeScript SDK: configure models, enable tools, stream events, then fetch text, JSON, run details or token stats in one call via .asText() or .allowTools('Read', 'Write'). Multi-level logging plus live onMessage/onToolUse callbacks give deep, CLI-compatible observability. ### Topics [claude](https://github.com/topics/claude "Topic: claude") [claude-code](https://github.com/topics/claude-code "Topic: claude-code") [claude-code-sdk](https://github.com/topics/claude-code-sdk "Topic: claude-code-sdk") [claude-code-typescript](https://github.com/topics/claude-code-typescript "Topic: claude-code-typescript") [claude-max](https://github.com/topics/claude-max "Topic: claude-max") ### Resources [Readme](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#readme-ov-file) ### License [MIT license](https://github.com/instantlyeasy/claude-code-sdk-ts#MIT-1-ov-file) ### Uh oh!
